title: Ripe Crisp Korean Cauliflower Songpyeon
description: A winey, crisp keto‑friendly snack that pairs Thai chili jam with fermented kimchi in steamed cauliflower dumplings.
instructions: Preheat oven to 400 degrees Fahrenheit and line a baking sheet with parchment.
Steam cauliflower florets until just tender, about 5 minutes; let cool.
In a bowl combine almond flour, ground flaxseed, salt, pepper, and rice vinegar, then whisk in egg to form a dough.
Stir in chopped kimchi and Thai chili jam until evenly distributed.
Roll the dough into small balls and wrap each around a cauliflower floret, forming a dumpling shape.
Brush the songpyeon with olive oil and place on the prepared baking sheet.
Bake for 15 minutes, turning once, until golden and crisp on the edges.
While baking, toast sesame seeds in a skillet over medium heat until fragrant, about 2 minutes.
Remove songpyeon from oven, drizzle with a splash of rice vinegar, and sprinkle toasted sesame seeds on top.
Serve hot as a snack or appetizer.
